name: neon-auth-v0-env
description: >- Provisions Neon Auth on a Neon branch, adds the user’s v0 sandbox URL to the Better Auth trusted-origins list, then prints shell exports for NEON_AUTH_BASE_URL and a 63-bit AUTH_SECRET. Use when wiring v0 (Vercel) sandboxes to Neon Auth, configuring trusted origins, or setting local env vars for Better Auth against Neon.
author: neondatabase
summary_zh: 这是个配置脚本，能自动在Neon分支初始化认证、把v0沙箱加入Better Auth白名单并输出环境变量，专治Vercel v0对接Neon Auth或本地搭建认证环境的繁琐步骤。
